title: SQL Server Top Resource Consumers
description: Identify top SQL and sessions by CPU, duration, and logical reads via Query Store and DMVs
author: A. Pogaku

session_summary.description: Active session snapshot with wait types and resource usage

interactive_hints.query_store_top_consumers: Run to identify the specific queries driving CPU and duration — ranks all queries by total resource consumption over time
interactive_hints.tempdb_contention: Run when sessions show PAGEIOLATCH or sort spill indicators — identifies which sessions are pressuring tempdb
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

query_store_top_consumers.description: Query Store top consumers by CPU, duration, execution count

interactive_hints.tempdb_contention: Run to confirm whether the top queries are spilling to tempdb — important for queries with large sorts or hash joins
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

tempdb_contention.description: TempDB allocation and contention by session

interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far
